details.context: Added .env to ignore list while keeping data/controller_profiles.json ignored.
Replaced plaintext client_id/client_secret/omada_id with client_id_env/client_secret_env/omada_id_env references.
Added .env loader/upsert helpers and default env variable key constants for credentials.
normalize_profile now resolves credentials from env keys and keeps legacy plaintext fallback compatibility.
Profile save now upserts credentials into .env and persists/exports only env-key references for profile credentials.
Documented .env.example usage and clarified that controller profile JSON no longer stores raw credentials.
Added .env/.env.example and tests/test_profile_service.py entries to project structure map.
Updated file inventory and line-count ranking to include .env files, new test, and modified source/doc LOC values.
Added config env helper responsibilities and connection/profile env-storage behavior, plus new profile service tests.
Documented config dependency for env helpers and updated connection/profile dependency details for env-based credential handling.
Added template for OMADA_CLIENT_ID, OMADA_CLIENT_SECRET, and OMADA_OMADAC_ID.
